message:
feat: async_ossl asupersync backend, UDS async expansion, Wayland input improvements

async_ossl (+364 lines):
- Add full asupersync runtime backend behind async-asupersync feature flag:
  AsyncRead, AsyncWrite, IoRegistration-based readiness with fallback backoff,
  poll_fn-driven I/O wrappers, and FuturesAsyncRead/Write bridge implementations
- Proper OpenSSL error code handling for WantRead/WantWrite in non-blocking mode
- Mutex-guarded IoRegistration for thread-safe async SslStream usage

uds (+435 lines):
- Extend Unix domain socket library with async-asupersync feature gate:
  AsyncUdsStream, AsyncUdsListener with IoRegistration, accept/connect with
  interest-based polling, and graceful shutdown support
- Add Unix credential extraction and peer process identification

client:
- Update client connection logic for async_ossl and uds async surface changes
- Cargo.toml dependency adjustments for new feature flags
- domain.rs refinements

frankenterm-mux-server-impl:
- dispatch.rs: extend mux dispatch with additional command routing and improved
  error handling for new async connection types
- Cargo.toml: dependency updates for new async features

Wayland window:
- inputhandler.rs: refine input event dispatching and key repeat handling
- keyboard.rs: keyboard state management improvements
- seat.rs: rework seat capability tracking and pointer/keyboard lifecycle
- state.rs (+105 lines): add Wayland compositor state tracking for surface
  configuration and output geometry management

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@ publish = false
 [dependencies]
 async-io = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 asupersync = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+futures.workspace = true
 
 [target.'cfg(not(any(windows, target_os="macos")))'.dependencies]
 openssl.workspace = true

@@ -11,6 +11,7 @@ publish = false
 [dependencies]
 async-io = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 asupersync = { workspace = true, optional = true }
+futures.workspace = true
 uds_windows.workspace = true
 
 [features]
